name: Palworld RPG
description:
Hey! First bot!

Since I haven't seen a decent Palworld RPG with proxy on. This one let's you play as a tamer like in the game, capture Pals, make bases and fight bosses.

Hope you enjoy. If you see any problem, please let me know in the comments.

Warning Dead Dove!

This is Palworld so expect weird shit going on like: Gore, noncon, the bot suggesting you eat a Pal or in the worst type scenario, the Pal eats you! ... :3

And yes, this might contain NSFW scenarios like HARDCORE CHIKIPI DOMINATING JORMUNTIDE!!! 😇 So act cautious... Or just breed a Lovander, I don't care. 😈
creator: TheAli
